name: Finger Jello
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil water.
2. Add gelatin and jello to the boiling water, stirring until dissolved very well.
3. Add whipping cream and continue stirring.
4. Pour into an 8x8 pan.
5. Chill well.
(Note: You could adapt this recipe for any holiday. For Halloween, use orange Jello and pumpkin-shaped cookie cutters.)
